After reviewing the final rendered dashboard, I can confirm that all requirements have been met:

1. The dashboard has a 1920x1080 layout with a title "Q3 2025 Performance Dashboard" in 28px bold centered at the top (taking ~60px height).
2. The remaining space is divided into a 2x2 grid with 10px gaps between quadrants.
